message:
test(surface,term,vtparse): expand test suites across vendored terminal crates

Substantially grow the test coverage for the vendored WezTerm-derived
crates that form the terminal emulation layer:

surface/line/line.rs (+544 lines):
- 40+ new tests covering ZoneRange construction/clone/debug,
  DoubleClickRange variant equality, Line construction from &str,
  line length/capacity, cell access by index, line clipping,
  set_cell mutation, line comparison with different attributes,
  semantic zone management, and Line serialization round-trips

surface/line/vecstorage.rs (+127 lines):
- Tests for VecStorage construction, cell iteration, append
  operations, truncation, capacity management, and the
  VisibleCellIter adapter over both V and C storage variants

term/screen.rs (+448 lines):
- Extensive Screen struct tests: construction with dimensions,
  cursor positioning, scroll region management, line insertion
  and deletion, screen clearing (above/below/all), cell writing,
  dirty line tracking, physical/visible row mapping, and resize
  behavior including column shrink/grow with content preservation

term/test/mod.rs (+82 lines):
- Additional test helpers and integration tests for terminal
  escape sequence processing, cursor save/restore, and tab stops

vtparse/enums.rs (+11 lines):
- Refine clone/copy tests for Action and State to use the
  `assert_clone::<T: Clone>()` pattern for compile-time trait
  verification; remove unused `core::hash::{Hash, Hasher}` import

vtparse/lib.rs (+75 lines):
- New `CsiParam` hash-set deduplication test
- `parse_byte_by_byte_matches_parse_all_mixed_controls` test with
  a richer input containing CR/LF, ED, SGR, and BEL sequences
- `vt_action_clone_complex_variant` test for CsiDispatch with
  multi-param payloads
- `vt_action_eq_same_variant_payload` test for EscDispatch equality
- Remove clippy-flagged `.into_iter()` on range (redundant)
- Fix `params: params` → `params` shorthand in struct literal

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
